name: Updraft Backup
description: WordPress UpdraftPlus equivalent — database and uploads backup from the admin dashboard.
author: NodePress

settings.label: Include plugins folder
settings.description: Archive plugins/ directory in backup tarball.

settings.label: Retention (days)
settings.description: Delete backup files older than this many days.

settings.label: Max backup files
settings.description: Keep only the newest N database backups.

settings.label: Schedule note
settings.description: Reminder text for your backup routine (cron not included).

settings.label: Notification email
settings.description: Optional email to notify after backup completes.
